name: PeerLearn Local
description: Environment variables for Member C workflow testing. Base URL, JWT tokens, and resource IDs.

values.description: JWT bearer token for student/regular user. Get from POST /api/auth/login response
JWT token for moderator role. Login as moderator user
JWT token for admin role. Login with admin credentials
Current student/user ID. Extract from GET /api/users/profile or login response
Tutor/Teacher ID. Get from GET /api/tutors response
Study material ID. Extract from POST /api/materials/upload response
Material link URL ID. Extract from POST /api/materials/upload-link response
Tutoring session/booking ID. Extract from POST /api/bookings response
Report ID for moderation cases. Extract from POST /api/moderation/reports response
